{{Quote|We have molded our city to be the way we want it, and we've maintained it that way. Everything is numbered and cataloged, and Khomm is a stable, understandable place. Our citizens are happy and content here.|[[Kaell 116]]|<ref name="Darksaber (novel)">[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']]</ref>}}
'''Heh'l City''' was one of the boxlike [[City/Legends|cities]] of [[Khomm/Legends|Khomm]]. It contained a [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] facility.<ref name="TEGtPaM" />

{{City-stub}}
